## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing Performed

- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] Manual QA, if applicable

## Architecture Decisions

Document architecture decisions, trade-offs, and alternatives.

## Design Decisions

Document design-system or UX impact, if applicable.

## Technical Debt

Document known follow-up work.

## Checklist

- [ ] The change aligns with `CONSTITUTION.md`.
- [ ] The change preserves privacy rules.
- [ ] Documentation was updated when needed.
- [ ] Tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, accounts, subscriptions, or cloud dependency were added.
